description: Lists in Judeo-Arabic of monetary contributions for children that were recorded in 5576 which is 1815/16CE. The contents of this shelfmark may be related to its neighboring fragment C 33, yet the structure of the list here is distinct in that there is more focus on the surnames of contributors, such as: Aghion, 'Akubas, Bilobos, Franses, and others. The monetary symbol for silver kurush appears throughout, but it is not clear that this is the only form of coinage in use given the mention of "פצה / silver" which often appears as a distinct denomination in other shelfmarks from the JRL C Series and elsewhere. MCD.
description_he: רשימות ביהודית-ערבית של תרומות כספיות לילדים שנרשמו ב-ה'תקע"ו (1815/16 לספירה). בין שמות התורמים: אגיון, עקובס, בילובוס, פרנסס ואחרים. הסמל הכספי לקורוש כסף מופיע לאורך. MCD.
